text: Waiting a while? We search each alias on each provider, so only keep the best ones!
You can click on any coloured square to jump straight to that chapter!
Clicking a scanlator name will add them to the 'Trusted' list, which get priority for downloads!
Provider matching wrong? Fix it by hitting 'Pick' on the provider list!
Use the 'Extra' toggle on chapters to mark bonus content like author notes or side stories.
Provider broken? Clownflare protected? Go to the Desktop tab and try hitting that cloudflare checkbox!
This would be faster if I wasn't so lazy...
The score input on each provider lets you prefer certain providers, perfect for tie-breakers
The 'Check New Chapters' task only scrapes providers that already have a match! Think of the future time saved!
Disabling a provider globally will exclude it from all future searches
You can use 'Scan Disk' to pick up chapters you've manually placed in the series folder.
You can use 'Scan Disk' to update when you've deleted chapters in the series folder.
Did you know? You can open the provider's website directly by clicking the provider link.
The tier badges show source quality: Official > Trusted > Unknown > No Group.
☕ While you wait, maybe make a coffee? This might take a minute.
If a download fails, try resetting the chapter and re-downloading. Sometimes providers have temporary issues.
